North Yakima they listened to the

OF approximately 100000 acres
of arid land under irrigation in
the west today, all but very. small
percentage has been developed by
private enterprise.


Irrigation projects in the state of
Washington furnish a fair compari-
son of work done by the govern
ment and the private corporations.
The Sunnyside canal, the largest
government project in the state,
was constructed by a private cor
poratio nand taken over by the gov
